title: The Baby Pact
original_title: The Wedding Pact 2: The Baby Pact
overview: With the sudden passing of her husband Mitch, a newly pregnant Elizabeth decides to move back to her hometown of Fort Wayne Indiana for a new start. But when a letter surfaces from her late husband, she must confront her past to save her future.
